adb.timeout: [!] ADB is not responding. Please check the cable, drivers, and the connected device.
adb.unauthorized_hint: [!] On the tablet, check the box on the left of the USB debugging prompt and tap ALLOW.
app.already_running2: Press the Enter key to close this window.
app.menu.back_to_menu: Press ENTER to return to the main menu.
app.menu.dev_msg2: I'm leaving this message because some users still have difficulty installing the ROM with the previously known SPFlashToolV6 method.
app.menu.dev_msg3: If you try LPMBox and like it, I would greatly appreciate it if you could help promote the program.
app.menu.dev_msg4: Thank you always for your interest, and have a wonderful day :)
app.mtk_driver.install_required_2: [!] Install the MediaTek drivers → close LPMBOX → run it again → then try again.
app.title: [LPMBox] Main Menu
bootstrap.embedded_restart: [*] Embedded Python detected. Restarting with embedded interpreter...
cable.check_1: ① Plug the cable into a rear USB port on the PC. (Laptops are fine.)
cable.check_2: ② Try again with the cable mentioned in the pinned comment.
country.change_plan_prompt: [!] Current device country code: {code}. Do you want to change the country code? (y/n):
country.change_prompt: Do you want to change the country code? (y/n):
country.invalid: [!] Invalid country code. Please enter a valid numeric value.
country.no_file: [!] proinfo file not found or could not be read.
country.not_detected: [!] Could not detect country code from proinfo.
country.notice: [!] Please enter the number of the country code you want to use. (e.g., 85 = United States of America, US)
country.number_prompt: Please enter the country code you want to change:
country.patching: [*] Patching proinfo with new country code
country.selected: [*] Country code entered by the user: {name} ({code})
country.unknown_bootloop: [!] If you ignore this warning and continue, the device may enter a 'boot loop' state!
country.unknown_cable: [!] The connected cable may be faulty, or the country code could not be detected!
dl.pt_skip: The Platform-Tools folder or adb.exe was not found. Please install Google Platform-Tools and try again.
dl.skip_prc: [*] PRC images already present. Skipping download.
dl.skip_python: [*] Embedded Python already present. Skipping download.
flash.failed.comment_hint: [!] Please leave a comment on the LPMBOX guide video.
flash.gui_started: [*] SPFlashTool has been run. Please do the proinfo backup(Readback) manually.
flow.ab_slot.error: [!] Failed to change active slot automatically. Please check the slot in fastboot manually.
flow.ab_slot.skip: [*] Device does not use A/B slots or slot could not be detected. Skipping slot change.
flow.ab_slot.switched: [+] Active slot switched to {slot}. The device may reboot several times.
flow.android_version_low: [!] The Android version is too low.
flow.block_firmware_missing: [!] block_firmware.ini is missing. Please check the LPMBOX files.
flow.copy_flash_done: [+] flash.xml and DA files copied for flashing.
flow.fastboot_not_detected: [!] Fastboot mode was not detected. Please check whether the device has entered fastboot.
flow.firmware_version_blocked: [!] This firmware version has known bugs and issues.
flow.firmware_version_blocked_2: [!] Delete the image folder in the LPMBOX folder → open the pinned guide comment for details,
flow.firmware_version_blocked_3: [!] Download the firmware file → extract it → move the image folder back, then try again.
flow.firmware_version_file_missing: [!] The file needed to detect the firmware version is missing. Delete the image folder in LPMBOX and copy it again.
flow.firmware_version_not_found: [!] Failed to detect the firmware version.
flow.flash_xml_mismatch: [!] The tablet model and the image folder do not match.
flow.keep_data.confirm: [*] Proceeding with firmware upgrade while keeping the userdata partition.
flow.keep_data.done: [+] Global(ROW) firmware upgrade [data retention] is complete
flow.keep_data.not_global_rom: [!] The firmware on the tablet is not Global (ROW).
flow.keep_data.not_global_rom_2: [!] Please try option 1 from the main menu.
flow.keep_data.rom_row_ok: [*] The device is on Global ROM (ROW).
flow.keep_data.unknown_region: [!] The device firmware is PRC. Please use option 1.
flow.lkdtbo_ready: [+] PRC lk, dtbo files are ready.
flow.model_not_supported: [!] This model is not supported by LPMBOX!
flow.not_mtk: [!] The device is not a MediaTek AP. Please connect the correct device.
flow.platform_mismatch: [!] The tablet model and the image folder do not match.
flow.platform_mismatch_2: [!] Prepare the correct image folder and try again.
flow.prc.rom_prc_ok: [*] The device is on China ROM (PRC).
flow.prc.rom_row_warn: [!] The firmware on the tablet is Global (ROW).
flow.prc.rom_row_warn_2: [!] Please try option 2 from the main menu.
flow.preloader_not_detected: [!] Failed to detect the MediaTek preloader port within the expected time. Please check the cable and power and try again.
flow.proinfo_copied: [+] proinfo copied to the Readback folder.
flow.wait_proinfo: [*] Waiting for proinfo to be read back...
flow.work_in_progress: [!] Work in progress. Do not touch the tablet, cable, or PC. (Wait 1–2 minutes)
menu.title: [LPMBox] PRC(China) / ROW(Global) firmware auto installer
ota.restore_start: [*] Restoring System Update (OTA) so you can update Android...
ota.software_update_hint: [!] Open Settings → bottom of the left menu → About tablet → Software update.
ota_enable.rom_row_warn: [!] The firmware on the tablet is Global (ROW). Skipping update enable.
prompt.use_arrow_keys: Use ↑/↓ and press Enter to select. (Or type a number/key)
scatter.convert: [*] Converting the encrypted file to xml...
scatter.convert_failed: [!] Failed to convert the scatter file. Please check the image folder and the *_Android_scatter.x file.
scatter.final_saved: [+] Removing temporary files and saving the {hw}-specific scatter file.
scatter.lk_dtbo_disabled: [+] Disabled lk/dtbo partition flashing in scatter.
scatter.lk_dtbo_enabled: [+] Enabled PRC lk/dtbo partition flashing in scatter.
scatter.not_found: [!] image folder is missing or some files are missing. Please check that the image folder is correct.
scatter.userdata_not_found: [!] Could not find userdata partition in scatter file.
scatter.userdata_patched: [+] Userdata partition updated for keep-data mode.
update.avail_prompt:
Current version: {curr} -> Latest version: {new}
  Open the GitHub releases page? (y/n):
update.avail_warning: [!] Warning: This is an outdated version. Please update to the latest version!
update.no_update: You are already using the latest version (LPMBox {version}).
flow.image_folder_missing: [!] The image folder is missing. Please check it and try again.
